overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through Night City's Vista del Rey district. The player character moves from a dark industrial maintenance corridor through a green-lit underpass, crosses a busy street with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians, and enters a dark parking garage with vibrant purple neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial maintenance corridor with ventilation walls

events.description: exits dark corridor into green-lit concrete underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow dark corridor with red ceiling lights visible ahead

entered.detail: industrial metal ventilation walls lining both sides of the narrow passage
small red lights on the ceiling of the dark corridor
smooth concrete ceiling of the highway overpass becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in a narrow, dark industrial corridor with metal ventilation walls on both sides and red indicator lights visible on the ceiling ahead. The camera walks forward through the passage until emerging into a green-lit concrete underpass at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing other pedestrians and vending machines

notable_agents.action: person in dark futuristic clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
metal railings along the right side of the walkway
brightly lit vending machine against the left wall
large digital billboard displaying advertisements above the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a green-lit underpass beneath an elevated highway, with concrete support pillars on the left and metal railings on the right. The area features an illuminated vending machine and digital billboards ahead, with sparse pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

events.description: pedestrian with cybernetic implants passes extremely close to camera, temporarily filling the frame
crossing the multi-lane street as futuristic vehicles pass by in both directions

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk then stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the busy street with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the street with headlights on
woman with visible cybernetic facial implants passing close to the camera

entered.detail: yellow tactile paving tiles along the edge of the sidewalk
large suspended digital screen showing media content above the street
traffic signals showing green for pedestrians
tall multi-story building with illuminated windows and red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Moving along a busy urban sidewalk with yellow tactile paving, approaching a street intersection. The camera passes under an overhead digital display and crosses the street among moderate pedestrian traffic while futuristic vehicles drive past. A pedestrian passes very close to the camera momentarily.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from main street to dark parking garage with neon accents

events.description: turns right into narrow alleyway with vibrant purple neon lighting and lounge furniture
enters dimly lit multi-level parking garage with minimal overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the street then turning into a dark side alley with purple neon lights before entering a parking garage

notable_agents.action: security guard standing with arms crossed near the neon-lit entrance

entered.detail: vibrant purple neon light strips illuminating a stairway and wall
white lounge chairs and umbrella setup on the sidewalk
dark multi-level parking structure with concrete floors and metal fencing

segments.scene_description: Walking along the street past a multi-level building with red accents, then turning right into a narrow alley featuring vibrant purple neon lighting and outdoor lounge furniture. A security guard stands near the entrance as the camera proceeds into a dimly lit parking garage with concrete pillars and minimal lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into the vibrant, neon-lit urban sprawl of Night City. It begins by moving through a narrow, dark passage lined with metal ventilation walls and red ceiling lights before emerging into a concrete underpass bathed in an eerie green glow. As the camera proceeds past illuminated vending machines and digital billboards beneath an elevated highway, the environment opens up into a busy city intersection filled with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians. The scene then shifts along a sidewalk with yellow tactile paving and past a red-accented building, before turning right into a narrow alley defined by vibrant purple neon lighting and outdoor lounge furniture. Finally, the camera passes a security guard and enters a dimly lit parking garage characterized by heavy concrete pillars and minimal lighting.
